# pheno-forge-plugins

> Sidecar bundle for `antinomyhq/forgecode` — local-first memory + config + tracing stack brought up as per-machine systemd units (or macOS launchd fallback).

## What

A tarball-installable plugin bundle for `antinomyhq/forgecode`. Six plugins (`pheno-supermemory`, `pheno-letta`, `pheno-cognee`, `pheno-mem0`, `pheno-config`, `pheno-tracing`) that spawn their respective sidecar binaries as per-machine systemd units. Zero code is injected into forgecode; everything is standard `plugin.toml` + `systemd` + shell.

## When

- You want forgecode sessions to have a canonical, local-first memory + config + tracing substrate.
- You are running the Phenotype fleet and want the locked stack per `findings/2026-06-23-forgecode-improvement-plan.md`.
- You want per-machine lifecycle (systemd), not per-session lifecycle.

## When NOT

- You don't use `antinomyhq/forgecode` — this bundle is forgecode-specific.
- You want a single-binary memory solution (use `supermemory` directly).
- You want cloud-managed memory (use `supermemory` cloud, `mem0` cloud, or `letta` cloud).

## 5-line quickstart

```bash
# Linux
curl -fsSL https://github.com/KooshaPari/pheno-forge-plugins/releases/download/v0.1.0/pheno-forge-plugins-v0.1.0.tar.gz | tar xz
cd pheno-forge-plugins-v0.1.0
./scripts/install.sh
sudo systemctl enable --now pheno-forge-sidecars.target
forge   # plugins auto-wire on session boot
```

```bash
# macOS (launchd fallback)
curl -fsSL https://github.com/KooshaPari/pheno-forge-plugins/releases/download/v0.1.0/pheno-forge-plugins-v0.1.0.tar.gz | tar xz
cd pheno-forge-plugins-v0.1.0
./scripts/install.sh
sudo ./scripts/launch-sidecars.sh
forge
```

## Stack

| Plugin | Backend | License | Endpoint | MemoryScope (per `thegent/docs/specs/memory/v2.md`) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `pheno-supermemory` | `supermemoryai/supermemory` | source-available | `:3030` | `Episodic` (primary) |
| `pheno-letta` | `letta-ai/letta` | Apache-2.0 | `:8283` | `Identity` (primary) |
| `pheno-cognee` | `topoteretes/cognee` MCP | Apache-2.0 | stdio | `ProjectKnowledge` (primary) |
| `pheno-mem0` | `mem0ai/mem0` | Apache-2.0 | `:8000` | `Fallback` (only when primary fails) |
| `pheno-config` | `KooshaPari/Configra` | Apache-2.0 | `:9100` | n/a (config) |
| `pheno-tracing` | `opentelemetry-collector-contrib` | Apache-2.0 | `:4317/:4318` | n/a (OTLP) |
